title: AssessmentAppeal
description: A property-tax assessment appeal filed with the NYC Tax Commission — an 'Application for Correction' of DOF's tentative assessed value and/or tax class. NET-NEW: there is NO public API for filing an appeal; today owners and their representatives file PDF forms (TC101 for Class 2/4, TC108 for Class 1, TC109 for condo units, TC106 for exemptions, plus income & expense statements TC201/TC203/TC208/TC214 and — for AV of $5.4M or more — the accountant's certification TC309) by hand or through the Tax Commission's online filing system. This schema serves both the read surface (list/get an applicant's own appeals) and the write surface (file an appeal). Deadline is typically March 15/16; a $175 fee applies when the assessed value is $2M or more (unless review is waived).

applicationId.description: Server-assigned application / appeal number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by the Tax Commission, not the applicant.

incomeExpense.description: Income & expense statement for income-producing property (TC201/TC203/TC208/TC214).

form.description: Which income & expense form (TC201 rental, TC203 co-op, TC208 hotel/etc.).

accountantCertificationTC309.description: TC309 accountant's certification — required when assessed value is $5.4M or more.

fee.description: Application fee — $175 when the assessed value is $2M or more (NYC Administrative Code); no fee if the applicant waives review before scheduling.

groupFiling.description: Whether this application is part of a group filing.
